emotional_tone: Authoritative, analytical, highly polished, professional enterprise.

surface_strategy.cards: bg-[#161B22] border border-[#30363D] rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] overflow-hidden
surface_strategy.header: bg-[#0D1117]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#30363D] sticky top-0 z-50

motion.tabs: Framer Motion layoutId for active tab indicator. Smooth fade in/out for tab content.
motion.numbers: react-countup or framer-motion for animated counter stats on load and update.
motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-[2px] on interactive cards. Border color transition.
motion.charts: Recharts native animations. Staggered entrance for list items/leaderboards.

components_instructions.sidebar: Left-nav panel. Fixed on desktop, collapsible on mobile. Must include Logo (icon + CPKC text), main navigation links, and a 'Model Status: Active' indicator at the bottom with a pulsing green dot.
components_instructions.executive_dashboard: Hero stats row (animated counters for Total Incidents, Risk Score, etc.). Main visual: Interactive Canada risk heatmap (use Recharts or a custom SVG map if available, otherwise a stylized geographic chart). Quick Route Risk widget on the right.
components_instructions.deep_dive_explorer: Use Shadcn Tabs for Geographic, Temporal, Correlation, Typology views. Ensure tabs have clean, underline-style or segmented-control style.
components_instructions.model_command_center: Dense, technical view. Include a leaderboard table (Shadcn Table) showing model versions/performance. Include ROC curves and Feature Importance bar charts (Recharts).
components_instructions.live_risk_assessor: Input form (Shadcn Form/Inputs) with realistic parameters. Submit button triggers an analysis that displays a Risk Gauge chart (Recharts RadialBar) and Feature Contribution Waterfall chart.
components_instructions.charts: Insight-first design. Every chart must have a small title and a muted subtitle/insight text explaining the takeaway. Custom Recharts tooltip with dark background (#161B22) and border (#30363D).

logo.description: Close-up of a vintage train metal surface. Use this as a small round avatar (w-8 h-8 rounded-full border border-[#30363D]) next to the text 'CPKC' for the brand logo in the sidebar.

hero_background.description: Train station at night with illuminated tracks. Can be used as a heavily faded (opacity-10) background image for the Executive Dashboard header or login screen.

empty_state.description: Steam train passes sheep. Use for empty states (e.g., 'No incidents found') by applying a grayscale filter, 50% opacity, and rounded corners.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the #0D1117 background meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Use the designated text_primary and text_secondary colors.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1A3A5C] focus:border-[#C8102E].
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='left-nav-dashboard', data-testid='risk-gauge-chart').

forbidden_elements: generic sans for headers if it feels like a template (use strict tight tracking)
